mapper.delete: DELETE s FROM iot_device_status s JOIN ( SELECT device_id, DATE_FORMAT(report_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H') AS hour_bucket, MAX(report_time) AS max_rt FROM iot_device_status WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND report_time >= #{todayStart} GROUP BY device_id, hour_bucket ) t ON s.device_id = t.device_id AND DATE_FORMAT(s.report_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H') = t.hour_bucket AND s.report_time < t.max_rt

DELETE s FROM iot_device_status s JOIN ( SELECT device_id, DATE_FORMAT(report_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H') AS hour_bucket, MAX(report_time) AS max_rt FROM iot_device_status WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND report_time >= #{todayStart} AND report_time < #{hourCutoff} GROUP BY device_id, hour_bucket ) t ON s.device_id = t.device_id AND DATE_FORMAT(s.report_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H') = t.hour_bucket AND s.report_time < t.max_rt

DELETE s FROM iot_device_status s JOIN ( SELECT device_id, DATE(report_time) AS day_bucket, MAX(report_time) AS max_rt FROM iot_device_status WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND report_time >= #{startDay} AND report_time < #{todayStart} GROUP BY device_id, day_bucket ) t ON s.device_id = t.device_id AND DATE(s.report_time) = t.day_bucket AND s.report_time < t.max_rt
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO iot_device_status_history ( id, device_id, device_code, temperature, humidity, battery_level, signal_strength, longitude, latitude, run_status, raw_data, report_time, receive_time, backup_time ) SELECT id, device_id, device_code, temperature, humidity, battery_level, signal_strength, longitude, latitude, run_status, raw_data, report_time, receive_time, NOW() FROM iot_device_status WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND report_time < #{beforeTime}
AND id <> #{keepId}
